allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat: Wave 1 infrastructure — tokenizer, model metadata, Groq provider, CLI modules *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: display engine, system prompt builder, /compact, Ctrl+C handling *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: streaming tool calls, Anthropic tool_use support, markdown renderer *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: update README with current features, add CHANGELOG *)
